description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages deps, build, test, and deploy using Ubuntu Docker images (ubuntu:bionic for Qt5 jobs and ubuntu:jammy for Qt6 jobs) and an apt-cache shared cache. In the deps stage add a build_dependencies job that sets APT_CACHE_DIR, installs wget and development packages via `apt-get update -yq && apt-get -o dir::cache::archives="$APT_CACHE_DIR" install -y wget libglib2.0-dev libsqlite3-dev libxml2-dev gtk-doc-tools libgirepository1.0-dev gobject-introspection libxml2-utils python3-gi python-gi-dev valac check python3-pip`, runs `pip3 install meson ninja`, then downloads, extracts, builds and installs libaccounts-glib with `meson build --prefix $STAGING --libdir lib`, `ninja`, and `ninja install || true`, and stores the staging directory as an artifact. In the build stage add build_amd64 (ubuntu:bionic) and build_amd64_qt6 (ubuntu:jammy) jobs that depend on build_dependencies, set STAGING, PKG_CONFIG_PATH, LD_LIBRARY_PATH, export QT_SELECT=qt5 (or use qmake6), run `qmake CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=coverage ..` (or `qmake6 CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=coverage ..`) followed by `make -j 4`, and archive the build directory as an artifact. In the test stage add test_amd64 (ubuntu:bionic) and test_amd64_qt6 (ubuntu:jammy) jobs that depend on the corresponding build jobs, set LD_LIBRARY_PATH, touch files with `find build | xargs touch`, and run `make coverage-html`, publishing the build directory as an artifact. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, installs Qt5 build tools via apt, runs `make docs`, copies coverage HTML and documentation into a public directory with `cp -a build/coverage-html public/coverage` and `cp -a build/doc/html/* public/`, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
